mapper.insert: INSERT INTO task (task_name, task_type, content, status, priority, plan_start_time, plan_end_time, actual_start_time, actual_end_time, max_retry_count, retry_count, executor_type, executor_config, calendar_flag, deleted, created_at, updated_at) VALUES (#{taskName}, #{taskType}, #{content}, #{status}, #{priority}, #{planStartTime}, #{planEndTime}, #{actualStartTime}, #{actualEndTime}, #{maxRetryCount}, #{retryCount}, #{executorType}, #{executorConfig}, #{calendarFlag}, #{deleted}, NOW(), NOW())
mapper.select: SELECT * FROM task WHERE deleted = 0 AND status = 'pending' AND plan_start_time IS NOT NULL AND plan_start_time <= NOW() AND (plan_end_time IS NULL OR plan_end_time >= NOW()) ORDER BY priority DESC, plan_start_time ASC LIMIT 500
mapper.update: UPDATE task SET status = 'queued', updated_at = NOW() WHERE id = #{taskId} AND status = 'pending' AND deleted = 0
mapper.select: SELECT * FROM task WHERE id = #{taskId} AND deleted = 0
mapper.update: UPDATE task SET status = 'running', actual_start_time = NOW(), updated_at = NOW() WHERE id = #{taskId}
UPDATE task SET status = 'finished', actual_end_time = NOW(), updated_at = NOW() WHERE id = #{taskId}
UPDATE task SET status = 'failed', updated_at = NOW() WHERE id = #{taskId}
UPDATE task SET status = 'expired', updated_at = NOW() WHERE id = #{taskId}
